name: IRC_PROFILE_ESTABLISHMENTS_V
query: SELECT CIB.CONTENT_ITEM_ID AS ESTABLISHMENT_ID, CIB.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, CITL.LANGUAGE, CITL.NAME, CIB.ITEM_TEXT_1 AS SCHOOL_CODE, CITL.ITEM_TEXT_TL_1 AS LOCATION, CITL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION, CIB.ITEM_NUMBER_1 AS PARTY_ID, CIB.COUNTRY_ID, CIB.STATE_PROVINCE_ID, CIB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, CIB.CREATED_BY, CIB.CREATION_DATE, CIB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CIB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CIB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 'HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS' AS SOURCE_TABLE FROM HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B CIB, HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_TL CITL WHERE CIB.CONTENT_TYPE_ID = 135 AND CIB.CONTENT_ITEM_ID = CITL.CONTENT_ITEM_ID AND CIB.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = CITL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
